svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="fLLt-h7LIrSksoeHj717" name="Page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1816" dy="969" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant Client
 participant API
 participant Redis
 participant MongoDB
 participant RabbitMQ
 participant Worker
 participant Provider

 Client->>API: POST /notifications
 API->>Redis: Rate limit check
 Redis-->>API: Allowed
 API->>MongoDB: Save notification (pending)
 API->>RabbitMQ: Publish message
 API->>MongoDB: Update status (queued)
 API-->>Client: 201 Created

 RabbitMQ->>Worker: Consume message
 Worker->>MongoDB: Update status (processing)
 Worker->>Provider: Send notification

 alt Success
 Provider-->>Worker: Delivered
 Worker->>MongoDB: status = sent
 else Failure
 Provider-->>Worker: Error
 Worker->>MongoDB: Retry / Failed
 end
",
 "config": null
